title: nephrodium thelypteris var. squamigerum
intro: Nephrodium thelypteris var. squamigerum, also known as the Scaled Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The Scaled Fern has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the Scaled Fern include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as relieving headaches and fever. The herbal preparations of the Scaled Fern typically involve drying and powdering the fronds, which can then be used in teas or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
